response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical curiosity, and demonstrated leadership in open-source and cross-functional projects, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI systems, cloud-based GenAI deployment, or RAG/vector database implementation — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects, workshops, and mentoring in agile environments
Hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization in work history
AI/GenAI experience appears recent and limited to agent tooling, not end-to-end production deployment
Lacks documented experience with multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI) or AI evaluation/observability pipelines
